text:
Renovation week. 

The website got a fresh coat of paint—new flow, better copy, clearer tier cards. Under the hood, we added a dedicated media upload service (finally), support for Grok-imagine, and custom ElevenLabs voices.

Also fed a bunch of bugs to the backend—stabilized the Wan video pipeline and taught the API some better manners regarding rate limits.

14 PRs merged. Go build something weird.
